cockatrice_carddatabase.cards:
Hunt Rathalos
R 2RR 4 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle 4
NYA Rathalos, King of the Skies 1 1 At the Beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Rathalos deals 3 damage to that player. Carve 3 (When this battle is defeated, each player that had a source they control deal damage to it creates 3 treasure tokens.)
Rathalos, King of the Skies
R
0 Legendary Creature - Dragon Creature 4/4
NYA Hunt Rathalos 2 Flying

NYA Rathian, Queen of the Land 1 1 At the beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Rathian deals 2 damage to that player. Carve 3

0 Legendary Creature - Dragon Creature 2/4
NYA Hunt Rathian 2 Toxic 1 (Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get a poison counter.)
Hunt Devijho
BRG 3BRG 6 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle 7
NYA Picklejho, Endless Hunger 1 1 Ward— Sacrifice a creature (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player Sacrifice a creature.) At the beginning of each players upkeep, that player faces a villainous choice - Hunt: Deviljho deals 5 damage to that player or that player sacrifices a creature and puts 2 defense counters on Hunt: Deviljho. Carve 3
Picklejho, Endless Hunger
BRG
0 Legendary Creature - Dinosaur Creature 5/6
NYA Hunt Devilhjo 2 When a Creature Dies, if ‘twas dealt damage by Picklejho this turn, put two +1/+1 counters on Picklejho.
Hunt Rey Dau
UR 3UR 5 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle 5
NYA Rey Dau, Electric Spear 1 1 At the beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Rey Dau deals 3 damage to that player, and taps the creature with the highest toughness among creatures they control, then puts a stun counter on it. Carve 3.
Rey Dau, Electric Spear
UR
0 Legendary Creature - Dragon Creature 4/4
NYA Hunt Rey Dau 2 Flying When Rey Dau attacks, it deals 3 damage to any target.

NYA Espinas, Forbidden Venom 1 1 At the Beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Espinas deals 1 damage to that player, then that players gets a poison counter. Espinas, Forbidden Venom

NYA Hunt Espinas 2 Flying, Toxic 2 (Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get two poison counters.)

WU

NYA Hunt Zinogre 2 When Zinogre attacks, draw a card for each tapped creature defending player controlsq When this Creature Becomes Blocked, tap the blocking creature and put a stun counter on it.
Hunt Brachydios
G 3GG 5 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle 5
NYA Brachydios, the Crushing Wyvern 1 1 At the beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Brachydios deals 1 damage to that player,then that player creates a 0/1 green ooze creature token named slime with Cumulative upkeep 1 and “When this creature dies, it deals 3 damage its controller.” (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.) Carve 3
Brachydios, the Crushing Wyvern
G
0 Legendary Creature - Ooze Dinosaur Creature 3/5
NYA Hunt Brachydios 2 When Brachydios attacks, defending player creates a 0/1green ooze creature token with Cumulative upkeep {1} and “When this creature dies, its controller takes 3 damage.” (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this creature, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.)
Hunt Gore Magala
B 5BB 7 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle 7
NYA Gore Magala, Dark Eclipse 1 1 Shroud At the beginning of each player’s upkeep, Hunt: Gore Magala deals 1 damage to that player,then if that player has less than 5 frenzy counters, they gain a frenzy counter unless that player pays 3 or U. (If a player deals 10 combat damage in a turn, remove all frenzy counters from that player and draw a card. If a player has 5 or more frenzy counters, combat damage dealt to them is doubled.) Carve 3
Gore Magala, Dark Eclipse
B
0 Legendary Creature - Nightmare Dragon // Legendary Creature - Elder Dragon Creature 5/7 // 10/10
NYA Hunt Gore Magala 2 When Gore Magala transforms, for each of up to three target creatures, create a colourless Frenzied Role token attached to that creature. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and is goaded. When enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, that player gets a frenzy counter.) {T}: Target player gets a frenzy counter. If that player has 5 or more frenzy counters, flip Gore Magala. --- Flying, Indestructible If a player has 5 or more frenzy counters, damage dealt to them is doubled.

Hunt Alpha Doshaguma
WG 2GW 4 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle 4
NYA Alpha Doshaguma, Pack Leader 1 1 Cleave 1GW (You may cast this spell for its cleave cost. If you do, remove the words in square brackets.) At the beginning of each players upkeep [Hunt: Doshaguma deals 1 damage to that player, then] that player creates a 2/2 white beast creature token named Doshaguma with banding and “This creature must attack if able.” (Any creatures with banding, and up to one without, can attack in a band. Bands are blocked as a group. If any creatures with banding you control are blocking or being blocked by a creature, you divide that creature’s combat damage, not its controller, among any of the creatures it’s being blocked by or is blocking.) Carve 3
Alpha Doshaguma, Pack Leader
WG

Palico
WUBRG 3WUBRG 8 Legendary Creature - Cat Ally Creature 2/3
NYA 2 The Hunter’s Companion - Your deck has up to 1 creature card. (If this card is your chosen companion, you may put it into your hand from outside the game for {3} any time you could cast a sorcery.) At the beginning of your end step, if you control a commander and it is tapped, gain 2 health. If it is untapped, put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. If you would lose the game for the first time, instead your life total becomes 5 and you lose all poison counters. Until end of turn, you have hexproof, you can’t lose the game and your opponents can’t win the game, and all damage that would reduce your life total below 1 is prevented.
Hunter
WUBRG WUBRG 5 Legendary Creature - Human Warrior Creature 4/4
NYA 2 When a battle is defeated, draw a card. {2}, Sacrifice a creature: Put X +1/+1 counters on this creature, where X is the sacrificed creature’s power.
Hunt Alatreon
WUBRG 4WUBRG 9 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle
NYA Alatreon, The Blazing Black Dragon 1 1 Indestructible. At the beginning of each players upkeep that player pays mana equal to that players devotion to white, otherwise destroy each land they control. (Each {W} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to white.) -mills cards equal to that players devotion to blue. (Each {U} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to blue.) -loses life equal to that players devotion to black. (Each {B} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to black.) -sacrifices non creatures equal to that players devotion to red . (Each {R} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to red.) -sacrifices creatures equal the that players devotion to green. (Each {G} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to green.) Carve 3 , This card can be your commander.
Alatreon, The Blazing Black Dragon
WUBRG
0 Legendary Creature - Elder Dragon Creature 4/4
NYA Hunt Alatreon 2 If you would gain life, gain that much life plus your devotion to white instead. (Each {W} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to white.) When you go to draw a card, draw cards equal to your devotion to blue instead (Each {U} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to blue.) Whenever you lose life, each opponent loses life equal to your devotion to black. (Each {B} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to black.) When you take damage, deal damage to any target equal to your devotion to red (Each {R} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to red.) Alatreon has +X/+X where X is your devotion to green. (Each {G} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to green.)

M UB // 1GUR 2 Instant // Instant Instant
NYA 1 3 Choose one: • Remove all defense counters from target battle. • Destroy target creature. • Counter target spell. --- Choose one: • Gain control of target creature. • Copy target spell. You may choose new targets for the copied spell.

NYA 1 Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature’s color.) If a source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player, it deals triple that damage instead.

NYA Fatalis, The Dark Demise 1 1 Indestructible this spell cant be countered At the Beginning of each players upkeep that player makes “Omen of the Dark Demise”, a Legendary Enchantment token that has “at the beginning of enchanted player’s Upkeep, if ‘Hunt: Fatalis’ is on the battlefield, that player loses the game.” Carve 3
Fatalis, The Dark Demise
B
0 Legendary Creature - Elder Dragon Creature 10/10
NYA Hunt Fatalis 2
Deathtouch, Trample, Flying, Hexproof, Protection from Deathtouch.
Hunt Dalamadur
10 10 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle 10
NYA Dalamadur, World Serpent 1 1 this spell cant be countered Ward 4 (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 4.) on each players upkeep, that player sacrifices four non-battle permanents they control. If they can’t, that player loses the game. When this battle is defeated, each player that had a source they control deal damage to it creates 5 treasure token.
